description: Per-source minimum coverage floor across the top-50 offense and top-50 IDP players, used by validate_api_data_contract. Top-50 is computed by sorting each assetClass ('offense' / 'idp') by values.overall descending and taking the first 50 rows. A source whose non-zero canonicalSiteValues count in that slice falls below its floor warns and marks the build as degraded. These floors catch silent regressions where a source still returns enough total rows to pass the row-count floor but loses coverage on the premium tier. Thresholds are tuned to live baseline minus ~5% slack; raise them once coverage stabilises.
